description: File expenses and submit reports to Expensify from the command line

novel_features.name: Quick expense from natural language
novel_features.description: File an expense with one line: amount, merchant, and category parsed from a short prompt — no forms, no web UI.

novel_features.name: Draft report from date range
novel_features.description: Create a report and auto-attach every un-reported expense from a date range in a single command.

novel_features.name: What's the damage
novel_features.description: Single-glance summary: total expensed, pending, approved, paid for the current month (or a custom range).

novel_features.name: Expense from bank line
novel_features.description: Paste a raw bank or card CSV row and the CLI extracts date/merchant/amount/currency and files the expense.

novel_features.name: Offline expense search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search over all your expenses by merchant, comment, category, or tag. Regex-friendly.

novel_features.name: Missing receipts
novel_features.description: Lists expenses without attached receipts so you can catch them before submitting a report.

novel_features.name: Monthly rollup
novel_features.description: Pivot-table expenses by category, tag, or merchant for any time range.

novel_features.name: Duplicate detection
novel_features.description: Finds expenses that look like duplicates by (merchant, amount, date±window).

novel_features.name: Bulk expense create
novel_features.description: File a whole list of expenses in a single Expense_Create request.

novel_features.name: Submit and wait
novel_features.description: Submit a report and optionally poll until it leaves SUBMITTED.
